verses.sanskrit: तस्मादसक्तः सततं कार्यं कर्म समाचर | असक्तो ह्याचरन्कर्म परमाप्नोति पूरुषः ||
verses.transliteration: tasmādasaktaḥ satataṃ kāryaṃ karma samācara | asakto hyācarankarma paramāpnoti pūruṣaḥ ||
verses.translation: Therefore, without attachment, always perform work which has to be done; for by performing work without attachment one attains the Supreme.

verses.sanskrit: मयि सर्वाणि कर्माणि सन्न्यस्याध्यात्मचेतसा | निराशीर्निर्ममो भूत्वा युध्यस्व विगतज्वरः ||
verses.transliteration: mayi sarvāṇi karmāṇi sannyasyādhyātmacetasa | nirāśīrnirmamo bhūtvā yudhyasva vigatajvaraḥ ||
verses.translation: Surrender all your actions to Me with your mind focused on the Self. Free from desire and ego, fight without grief.
